calendar.matters:
Mtn To Renew A Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc As Of 6/3/19 That Was Rejected On 5/29/19
Off Calendar Dec-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BRIAN MCGILL'S Motion To Renew A Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc As Of 6/3/19 That Was Rejected On 5/29/19.

Plaintiff Brian McGill's motion to renew judgment nunc pro tunc to June 3, 2019 is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HEK)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
